text: While research-policy dialogue is commonly discussed at the national and EU level, relatively little is known about local urban-level processes. This chapter aims to fill this gap by analysing and describing the form, character and content of the research-policy dialogue at the local urban level of European cities. It adds a deeper layer to the dialogue by showing how the city level policy-dialogue process interlinks with the national context and how the EU supports horizontal learning at the urban level. EU initiatives played a crucial role in furthering the policy dialogue between the research community and urban policymakers by facilitating the learning of urban strategies through their research-based funding activities and their support to strong trans-European city networks.
